title: Tala Wooden Salt&Pepper Mill Set with Fully Adjustable Ceramic Grinder with course and fine settings,Comes in Grey Colour,Comes with Acacia Wood Mill Rest,Perfect for Restaurant use,Made with FSC Wood
features: ELEGENT WALNUT COLOUR FINISH: Featuring a rich Grey colour, this 150mm Tala mill set adds a sophisticated, timeless look to any dining table or kitchen
CERAMIC GRINDING MECHANISM: Designed for durability, the Tala mill includes a premium ceramic grinder that ensures long-lasting, rust-free performance
FULLY ADJUSTABLE GRIND SETTINGS: Customise your grind from fine to coarse for perfect seasoning, giving you complete control over your dispensing

VERSATILE DESIGN: Perfect for home or for professional use, This Mill is ideal for Kitchen and table use and perfect for Restaurants and Cafes, the Tala Seasoning Mills combines style and practicality for any setting
Mill REST: This Bundle includes a Premium Laquered Acaia Mill Rest, crafted from high-quality lacquered acacia wood, Thjis is ideal for storing your Mills and preventing stay Salt and Pepper
TALA: Beloved Kitchenware Brand since 1899, with over 120 years of Baking Hertitage
description: Enhance your dining experience with the Tala Wooden Salt and Pepper Mills Made from sustainably sourced wood, this stylish mill features a premium quality ceramic grinder for consistent, rust-free performance. Perfect for both home kitchens and for Home, Restaurants, Cafes, and Hotels use, it offers durability, reliability, and a touch of elegance for any settingTala is one of the oldest best loved Kitchenware Brands. A trusted supplier of Baking and Caking Decorating supplies since 1899, Tala has grown to supply cooks and bakers all over the world. Today Tala Manufactures products in nunmerous sites across the UK including Liverpool, Accroington, Norfolk and Burnley. Traditional methods are still used to manufacture most Tala Products
